title: A Look At Lucid Group (LCID) Valuation After Mixed Q1 Earnings And Ongoing Funding Concerns
text: Following Q1 2026 earnings, analysts reassessed Lucid's valuation amid mixed results and ongoing funding concerns. The company suspended full-year guidance due to operational challenges identified by new CEO Silvio Napoli. Production challenges related to the Gravity SUV and widening losses raised questions about the company's path to profitability and capital efficiency. The valuation analysis highlighted the tension between Lucid's growth potential and its current cash burn rate, which threatens runway. Multiple analysts revised their models to reflect lower revenue expectations and extended timelines to profitability.
